titleStmt.title: SII 28.223: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 223. (A.R. No. 378 of 1913.) Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, south base.

p.note: In the Annual Report the date is given as 16.

summary.p: The final portion of the inscription is lost. It records the endowment of 8 kāśu for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of God Śiṟuttirukkōyil-Mahādēvar at Uṟumūr alias Śrī-Vikkiramachōḻa-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam in Vaḍakarai Viruda-rāja-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu for ensuring the well-being of Tirumāmbaḻam-chūṟṟi alias Muṉaiyataraiyappallavaraiyaṉ, one of the chaḷikkis of Toṇḍaimaṇḍalam staying in Āṉaivāri, the eastern hamlet of Vaḷavaṉ-mādēvichcharuppēdimaṅgalam. The amount was entrusted to the śivabrāhmaṇar, holding kāṇi in the temple who were enjoined to burn the lamp with ghee from the interest on the endowment amount. It is not stated as to who made the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vikkiramacoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1āvatu vaṭakarai virutarājabhayaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭu vaḷavaṉmātevic caruppetimaṅkalattu kiḻpiṭākai Āṉaivāriyil I[ run=ta] toṇṭaimaṇṭalattu caḷikkikaḷil tirumā
mpaḻam cūṟṟi Āna muṉaiyataraiyappallavaraiyaṉukku naṉṟāka Inṉāṭṭu Uṟumurāṉa śrīvikkiramacoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār ciṟuttirukkoyil mahātevar koyilile Upayamāka cantṛātitta
val Oru tirunun=tāviḷakku celuttakkaṭavatāka Ikkoyilil kāṇi Āḷarāna civabrāhmaṇar kaiyil kuṭutta kācu 8 Ikkācu 8 kkum kācu Oṉṟukku niṅkaḷ kku palicai Āl ney koṇṭu Ippakal Oru tiruṉun=tā
Digital edition of SII 28.223 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
